column1: # goal: pipeline efficiency — eliminate redundant audio loads, add parallelism, optimize FFmpeg

column7: cache audio in create_clips — load once instead of N per clip (eliminates N-1 redundant loads)
accept pre-loaded audio in convert_to_mp3 to avoid redundant disk read
add 3 tests validating audio caching (load-once, skip-load with _audio)
fix test fixture for lazy import (patch faster_whisper.WhisperModel instead of transcription.WhisperModel)
add -movflags +faststart to all FFmpeg video outputs — progressive playback optimization
use FFmpeg directly for MP3 conversion — skip pydub decode/re-encode overhead
cache probe_video results — avoid N redundant ffprobe subprocess calls per source video
lazy-load beep sound — skip WAV I/O on AudioProcessor init (ducking replaced beeping)
lazy import openai in ContentEditor — defer heavy module load to __init__
